summary: Iteration 118 - Dispute Declarants UX Feature Testing: All tests passed (100%). Backend API returns declarants array with first_name and declared_status. Frontend displays named phrases like 'Igaal a déclaré que Test était absent(e)' instead of anonymous counts.

backend_pytest: ✅ test_disputes_mine_declarants_have_required_fields - Each declarant has first_name and declared_status
✅ test_dispute_detail_declarants_have_required_fields - Detail view declarants have required fields
✅ test_dispute_detail_has_igaal_as_declarant - Igaal found as declarant with 'absent' status
✅ test_dispute_detail_no_reclassification_actions - No reclassification actions on dispute detail
frontend_playwright: ✅ Login flow works correctly for testuser_audit@nlyt.app
✅ Disputes list page loads and shows dispute cards
✅ Dispute detail page loads without errors (data-testid='dispute-detail-page')
✅ Declarant first name 'Igaal' is displayed instead of count
✅ Declaration phrase 'a déclaré' found in summary
✅ No 'Reclasser' button found on dispute detail page
✅ No 'Évaluer' button found on dispute detail page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dispute declarants UX feature complete. Backend _get_anonymized_summary() now returns declarants list with first_name and declared_status. Frontend DeclarationSummaryBlock component displays named phrases. Single declarant: 'Igaal a déclaré que vous étiez absent(e)'. Multiple declarants would show: 'Jean et Marie ont déclaré...' or 'Jean, Marie et X autres ont déclaré...'. Detailed list view with data-testid='declarant-row-{i}' shows when >1 declarants.

features_verified.3_declarant_first_name: ✅ VERIFIED - Each declarant has first_name field (e.g., 'Igaal')
features_verified.4_declarant_declared_status: ✅ VERIFIED - Each declarant has declared_status field (e.g., 'absent')
features_verified.5_frontend_named_phrases: ✅ VERIFIED - Shows 'Igaal a déclaré que Test était absent(e)' instead of '1 a déclaré'
features_verified.6_frontend_no_declarants: ✅ VERIFIED - Shows 'Aucune déclaration de présence reçue' when no declarants
features_verified.7_no_reclassification_actions: ✅ VERIFIED - No 'Reclasser' or 'Évaluer' buttons on dispute detail page
features_verified.9_disputes_list_page: ✅ VERIFIED - /litiges page loads and shows dispute cards
